info.title: VentraPOS API
info.description: HTTP API for VentraPOS. Authenticated calls support `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>` (JSON from POST /api/auth/login when enabled) and/or the `__ventra_at` access cookie. Send `X-Branch-Id` to scope a branch. See docs/API-SECURITY.md.

servers.description: Local (pnpm dev) — use this in API reference to Try it

platformKey.name: X-Ventra-Platform-Key
platformKey.description: Platform (superadmin) key from VENTRA_PLATFORM_API_KEYS. Use with X-Act-As-Business-Id on tenant routes, or alone on /api/platform/*.

actAsBusiness.name: X-Act-As-Business-Id
actAsBusiness.description: Target business UUID when authenticating with X-Ventra-Platform-Key on tenant-scoped routes.
